channel.title: Node.js on Mike Ball
channel.description: Recent content in Node.js on Mike Ball

item.title: Philadelphia Police Advisory Commission Complaint Map
item.description:
My map of 2009 – 2012 complaints filed with the Philadelphia Police Advisory Commission won first place at the 2013 Barcamp News Innovation Hackathon.

The map plots the details surrounding complaints filed with the Police Advisory Commission by citizens against Philadelphia Police Officers. Its data is published by Open Data Philly and has been imported to a public Google Spreadsheet. According to Open Data Philly, the data comes directly from the Police Advisory Commission Complaint Database.

The map was built in an afternoon and uses Leaflet, Node.js, and Backbone. Its source code is available on Github.

View the map »

item.title: Using the civic-info Node.js Module to Get Voter and Election Info
item.description: A quick tutorial in using a simple NPM module I built.

item.title: Deploying an Express App to Heroku
item.description: A beginner's tutorial in deploying a Node.js app to Heroku.

item.title: Testing Node.js with Mocha, Expect.js, and Nock
item.description: A technique for mocking HTTP requests in your Node.js tests.

item.title: Using Mocha to Test a Node.js Server
item.description: Using Node.js's fork to write tests against a server.
